channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [LLOYDSME] Lloyds Metals Subsidiary to Acquire Stake in PNG Entity
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Lloyds Metals and Energy Ltd's wholly-owned subsidiary, Lloyds Global Resources FZCO, has received approval to acquire an equity stake in an entity in Papua New Guinea. The entity, Lloyds Panguna Metals and Energy Limited (LPMEL), will engage with Bougainville Copper Limited (BCL) to pursue a long-term cooperation and mining agreement for the Panguna Mine in the Autonomous Region of Bougainville.

  • Lloyds Global Resources FZCO to acquire equity stake in Papua New Guinea entity.
  • LPMEL will be a step-down subsidiary of Lloyds Metals and Energy Ltd.
  • LPMEL to engage with Bougainville Copper Limited for Panguna Mine cooperation.
  • Board approved issuance of Non-Convertible Debentures up to ₹700 Crore.
  • Final Dividend of 100% (Re. 1/- per share) approved for FY 2025-26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LLOYDS METALS AND ENERGY LTD. | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [CUBEXTUB] Cubex Tubings Board Meeting Revised to May 15, 2026
item.description:
Cubex Tubings Ltd has announced that the Board Meeting scheduled for May 15, 2026, will proceed as planned. The meeting will address the approval of the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, along with any other business approved by the Chair.

  • Board meeting to be held on May 15, 2026.
  • Meeting to approve audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Other business matters may be discussed with the Chair's permission.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CUBEX TUBINGS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [CARNATIN] Carnation Industries Approves FY26 Audited Results
item.description:
Carnation Industries Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, along with the auditor's report with an unmodified opinion. The board also approved the appointment of M/s Jha Gunjan & Associates as the Internal Auditor for the financial year 2026-27. The board meeting was held on May 5, 2026, from 5:30 P.M. to 7:15 P.M.

  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved with unmodified auditor's opinion.
  • M/s Jha Gunjan & Associates appointed as Internal Auditor for FY2026-27.
  • Auditor highlighted writing back liabilities of ₹233.84 Lacs in FY24-25.
  • Auditor noted speculative transactions with immaterial financial impact.
  • Authorised share capital alteration noted by auditor.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CARNATION INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [KRITIIND] Kriti Industries: Nil Deviation Statement for Quarter Ended March 2026
item.description:
Kriti Industries India Ltd has submitted a statement of deviation for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, in compliance with SEBI regulations. The company reported a NIL statement of deviation, indicating no modification in the project and fund utilization. Till the quarter end, ₹7425.297 Lakhs has been raised. The company is in the process of filing the corporate announcement in XBRL format.

  • Kriti Industries reports NIL deviation in fund utilization for Q4 2026.
  • No modifications in the project or fund utilization during the quarter.
  • Total ₹7425.297 Lakhs raised till the end of the quarter.
  • CARE Ratings Limited is the monitoring agency.
  • Company filing Corporate Announcement under Regulation 32(1) in XBRL format.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KRITI INDUSTRIES (INDIA) LTD.-$ | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [JAYANT] Jayant Infratech EGM to be held on May 27, 2026
item.description:
Jayant Infratech Ltd has announced that its Extra-Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) will be held on Wednesday, May 27, 2026, at 04:00 P.M. (IST) at the company's corporate office in Bilaspur. The EGM notice includes details on offering, issuing, and allotting equity shares for consideration other than cash on a preferential basis. The notice and e-voting instructions are available on the company's website, the BSE website, and the Registrar and Transfer Agent's website.

  • Jayant Infratech EGM scheduled for May 27, 2026, at 4:00 PM (IST).
  • EGM to discuss offering and allotting equity shares on a preferential basis.
  • Notice available on Jayant Infratech, BSE, and Bigshare Services websites.
  • Company providing e-voting facility to its members for the EGM.
  • The company plans to issue up to 12,55,000 equity shares at ₹70 per share.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jayant Infratech Ltd | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [SAGL] Spice Lounge Clarifies on Share Price Movement
item.description:
Spice Lounge Food Works Ltd. has clarified that the recent movement in the company's share price is purely market-driven. The company confirms compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and states that all material information has been disclosed to the stock exchanges. There are no undisclosed material announcements that could be affecting the share price.

  • Spice Lounge complies with SEBI's Listing Obligations.
  • All price-sensitive information has been disclosed.
  • No undisclosed material information exists.
  • Share price movement is market-driven.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shalimar Agencies Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [UBL] United Breweries Re-appoints B S R & Co. as Statutory Auditors
item.description:
United Breweries Ltd has re-appointed Messrs. B S R & Co. LLP, Chartered Accountants, as the Statutory Auditors of the company for a term of 5 consecutive years, from the conclusion of the 27th AGM in 2026 until the conclusion of the 32nd AGM in 2031. The re-appointment is subject to the approval of the members of the company at the upcoming 27th AGM. The decision was made by the Board of Directors based on the recommendation of the Audit Committee at its meeting held on May 05, 2026.

  • B S R & Co. LLP re-appointed as Statutory Auditors for 5 years.
  • Term from 2026 AGM to 2031 AGM, subject to member approval.
  • Board's decision based on Audit Committee recommendation.
  • B S R & Co. LLP is a member entity of B S R & Affiliates.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UNITED BREWERIES LTD.-$ | Category: Auditor

item.title: [DHILLON] Dhillon Freight: Share Price Movement Market Driven
item.description:
Dhillon Freight Carrier Ltd clarifies that the recent movement in its share price is purely market-driven and potentially influenced by external factors beyond the company's control. This statement follows an inquiry regarding significant share price movement. The company affirms that it has disclosed all material information as required by SEBI regulations and is unaware of any specific events impacting its share price or trading volume.

  • Dhillon Freight states share price movement is market driven.
  • Company is unaware of specific events influencing price.
  • All material information disclosed as per SEBI regulations.
  • External factors may be influencing share price.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dhillon Freight Carrier Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [UBL] United Breweries: Record Date & AGM Date Set
item.description:
United Breweries Ltd. announced the record date as August 07, 2026, for dividend eligibility, subject to member approval at the 27th Annual General Meeting (AGM). The AGM is scheduled for August 12, 2026, at 1.00 p.m. (IST) via video conferencing. The board meeting, which approved these matters, was held on May 05, 2026, commencing at 12.15 p.m. (IST) and concluding at 06.45 p.m. (IST).

  • Record date fixed as August 07, 2026, for dividend eligibility.
  • 27th AGM scheduled for August 12, 2026, via video conferencing.
  • AGM will be held at 1.00 p.m. (IST).
  • Board meeting approved the record date and AGM date on May 05, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UNITED BREWERIES LTD.-$ | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [LT] L&T Designates P. Ramakrishnan as Key Managerial Personnel
item.description:
Larsen & Toubro Ltd. has designated Mr. P. Ramakrishnan, the newly appointed Chief Financial Officer (effective July 1, 2026), as a Key Managerial Personnel. He is authorized to determine the materiality of events or information according to the company's policy and make necessary disclosures to the Stock Exchanges.

  • P. Ramakrishnan appointed as Chief Financial Officer effective July 1, 2026.
  • Ramakrishnan designated as Key Managerial Personnel.
  • He is authorized to determine materiality of events.
  • Ramakrishnan will make disclosures to Stock Exchanges.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LARSEN & TOUBRO LTD. | Category: Management Change
